_comment: Arise Dothan — primary site config. Content harvested from the live arisedothan.com; CONFIRM with the Arise leader before launch. Placeholders (PLACEHOLDER_*) still need real values.

seo.default_meta_description: Arise Dothan is a Spirit-filled, Bible-centered church plant in Dothan, AL. We gather at Mural City Coffee to follow Jesus, become like Him, and do what He did. All are welcome — text Pastor Brian to start the conversation.

integrations._newsletter_endpoint_note: GoHighLevel inbound webhook for the 'Website Email Signup' workflow (published). Maps email/first_name/source into a GHL contact.
integrations._pastor_sms_note: CONFIRMED (Christian, 2026-07-02): this is Pastor Brian's personal cell — the plan-visit composer and all 'Text Pastor Brian' sms: links open Messages pre-filled to this number. E.164 format with +1.

home.hero_title: Rise with us in the heart of Dothan.
home.hero_sub: A Spirit-filled, Bible-centered church for anyone — whether you've never set foot in a church, walked away from one, or got worn out inside one. Come as you are — there's a seat for you.

our_story.hero_title: A new church rising in the heart of Dothan.
our_story.hero_sub: We exist to help people follow Jesus, become like Him, and do what He did — right here in the Wiregrass.

gatherings.hero_title: Come and see. We saved you a seat.
gatherings.hero_sub: We meet at Mural City Coffee in Dothan. Casual, warm, and centered on Jesus.

give.hero_sub: Every gift helps us make disciples who make disciples and build the team launching Sunday worship in Dothan — and beyond.

connect.hero_sub: No forms, no pressure. Tell us a little about you and we'll open a text to Pastor Brian — you'll be talking to a real person before you ever walk in the door.

beliefs.hero_sub: The convictions that shape everything we do — rooted in Scripture, centered on Jesus, and alive by the Spirit.

values.title: Love God
values.text: We pursue Jesus above all else through worship, prayer, and obedience.

values.title: Love People
values.text: We love others with the compassion, grace, and truth of Christ.

values.title: Serve Humbly
values.text: We follow Jesus by putting others before ourselves and serving with humility.

values.title: Give Generously
values.text: We live open-handed with our time, talents, and resources for God's kingdom.

values.title: Steward Well
values.text: We faithfully manage everything God has entrusted to us for His glory.

values.title: Be Spirit Led
values.text: We depend on the Holy Spirit to guide, empower, and transform us as we follow Jesus.

vision.title: The future we're praying toward
vision.lede: We see people in Dothan follow Jesus, become like Him, and do what He did in the power of the Spirit.

mission.title: Multiplying disciples across our city
mission.lede: We participate in God's kingdom by multiplying disciples across our city.
mission.text: We believe God is already at work in Dothan, and our role is to join Him by making disciples who make disciples.

leadership.name: Brian Turner
leadership.bio: Brian holds a Master of Divinity and is pursuing a Ph.D. in Renewal Theology. He leads Arise with a deep love for Scripture and for the people of the Wiregrass.

leadership.name: Jaclyn Turner
leadership.bio: Jaclyn holds a Master of Christian Life Coaching and Counseling and helps shepherd the Arise community with warmth, care, and discipleship.

gatherings.detail: Making disciples who make disciples and building our launch team — coffee, prayer, Scripture, and conversation at Mural City Coffee.
Once a month, we move out together to serve Dothan and the Wiregrass — demonstrating the kingdom and loving our city in Jesus' name.
A relaxed evening for the curious — meet the Arise family, hear our story, and ask anything. Follow us on social or text Pastor Brian for this month's date and location.

_giving_note: Online giving goes through our partner church's PushPay portal (Restoration Madison) — donors must pick the 'Tithes - Arise Church (Dothan)' fund so gifts are designated correctly.
_agent_native_note: Read-only in v1 (per the plan). Kept DISABLED until services/service_areas are defined for this config and a hosting worker is set up. Flip enabled:true after that.

agent_native.name: Arise Dothan
agent_native.description: A Spirit-filled, Bible-centered church plant in Dothan, AL.

services.name: Disciple Making Community
services.description: Every Thursday, 6:00 PM at Mural City Coffee — making disciples and building our launch team ahead of Sunday morning worship gatherings.

services.name: Serve the City
services.description: Monthly community service, 2nd Saturday, serving Dothan and the Wiregrass.

services.name: Interest Night
services.description: Monthly on-ramp event for newcomers; date and location announced each month.

pages.title: Arise Dothan | A Spirit-filled, Bible-centered church in Dothan, AL
pages.meta_description: Arise Dothan is a church plant meeting at Mural City Coffee in Dothan. Follow Jesus, become like Him, do what He did. Text Pastor Brian to start the conversation.

pages.title: Our Story
pages.meta_description: Meet Arise Dothan — our mission to make disciples who make disciples, our core values, and our leaders Brian & Jaclyn Turner.

pages.title: What We Believe
pages.meta_description: What Arise Dothan believes — rooted in Scripture, centered on Jesus, alive by the Spirit, and lived out as we Move Up, Move In, and Move Out, plus the Foursquare Church's official Declaration of Faith.

pages.title: Gatherings & What to Expect
pages.meta_description: When and where Arise Dothan gathers — our Thursday Disciple Making Community at 6 PM at Mural City Coffee, plus our monthly Interest Night and serving the city together on the 2nd Saturday. Text Pastor Brian to plan your first Thursday.

pages.title: Give
pages.meta_description: Give to Arise Dothan online through our partner church — just choose 'Tithes - Arise Church (Dothan)' from the dropdown, or give in person or by mail. Every gift helps us make disciples who make disciples and build our launch team.

pages.title: Plan Your Visit
pages.meta_description: Planning a first visit to Arise Dothan? Skip the form — send a quick text straight to Pastor Brian and start a real conversation before you ever visit.
